CREATE TABLE user (u_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, u_name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT REPLACING INTO user (u_id, u_name) VALUES (1, 'alice');
INSERT REPLACING INTO user (u_id, u_name) VALUES (1, 'bob');
INSERT REPLACING INTO user (u_id, u_name) VALUES (2, 'charlie');
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, u_id INTEGER, product VARCHAR(50), FOREIGN KEY (u_id) REFERENCES user(u_id));
INSERT REPLACING INTO orders (order_id, u_id, product) VALUES (1, 1, 'book');
INSERT REPLACING INTO orders (order_id, u_id, product) SELECT 2, u_id, 'pen' FROM user WHERE u_name = 'bob';
INSERT REPLACING INTO user (u_id, u_name) SELECT 3, 'dave' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user WHERE u_id = 3);
INSERT REPLACING INTO user (u_id, u_name) VALUES (SELECT MAX(u_id) + 1, 'eve' FROM user);
INSERT REPLACING INTO user (u_id, u_name) VALUES (4, (SELECT MAX(u_name) FROM user));
INSERT REPLACING INTO user (u_id, u_name) VALUES (5, (SELECT u_name FROM user WHERE u_id = 1 LIMIT 1) || '_copy');
